法整備がガバガバに遅くて規制もユルユルだから好き勝手できるぞ！！
ちょうど国内モデルが無くて困っているところなんだ！！
priority.summary: 日本网友调侃Anthropic迁移到日本，因为日本AI法规宽松、国内缺乏本土大模型。反映全球AI监管差异和日本市场机遇。
angles: 日本AI监管有多宽松？为何科技公司都想去
全球AI法规大对比：美国严格vs日本宽松
国内AI模型空白，日本成为新避风港？

priority.full_text:
Elon Musk is an engineer.

Jeff Bezos is an engineer.

Larry Elison is an engineer.

Larry Page is an engineer.

Sergey Brin is an engineer.

Jensen Huang is an engineer.

Turns out capitalism does reward skills and intelligence, and the richest people are indeed engineers. https://t.co/coHRPIOJMd
priority.summary: 观点：全球最富有的科技领袖（Musk、Bezos、Ellison、Page、Brin、Huang）都是工程师，说明资本主义奖励技能和智力。非AI产品/事件，属于商业观点。
angles: 6位科技首富都是工程师，这说明了什么
工程师思维如何打造万亿帝国
资本主义最终奖励的是技术能力

backup.full_text:
Finally, so sick!

We all wanted to make this but the problem was Google owned the 3d data and charged a lot for it

You made a web game using Google's 3d tiles and quickly your bill would be $10,000

Microsoft Flight Simulator runs on Microsoft's Bing Maps 3d data so that's why
backup.summary: 讨论3D网页游戏开发成本问题：Google 3D数据收费高达$10,000+，Microsoft Flight Simulator使用Bing Maps 3D数据的成本优势。
angles: Google 3D数据$10,000天价费用，开发者被迫转向Microsoft
为什么Flight Simulator比其他游戏便宜？Bing Maps的秘密
3D地图数据成本对比：Google vs Microsoft谁更厚道

My opinion is that Mythos is the current best model but not actually some world-changing dangerous model, and that anthropic did their usual song and dance about safety largely because they didn’t have enough compute to serve it at scale

So then they launched Fable because they
